chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. 666 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Hearing. 1. For order on CMA No. 5123/18. 2. For order on CMA No. 2792/18. 3. For hearing of main case. -------------- 08.08.2024. Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ---------- Counsel for the Petitioner, while confronted, does not press this petition along with pending applications. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
